data: {"value":[{"number":1000,"repo":"acme/api","title":"Onboarding funnel drop-off: add test for onboarding-funnel","author":"ivan","state":"merged","additions":571,"deletions":11,"created_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00.000Z","merged_at":"2026-05-16T00:00:00.000Z","base":"main","body":"This change addresses o…(+788)

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def repo-stats
  (map (fn [[repo repo-prs]]
         {:repo repo
          :open-count (count (filter #(= "open" (:state %)) repo-prs))
          :merged-closes-linear (count (filter #(and (= "merged" (:state %)) (:closes_linear %)) repo-prs))})
       (group-by :repo prs)))

repo-stats"}
